title: H4M WORKFORCE ACCOUNTABILITY ATTENDANCE AND PAYROLL
description: Full-stack admin system for employee records, attendance monitoring, payroll workflows, and reports.
images: /images/real project admin panel of attendance monitoring app/project profile.png
/images/real project admin panel of attendance monitoring app/employee directory.png
/images/real project admin panel of attendance monitoring app/week 5 deployment in vercel.png
content:
### Project Overview
Built a full-stack admin panel with **Node.js** and **Tailwind CSS**. Features include:
- Employee records management
- Attendance monitoring with device recognition
- Automated payroll workflows
- Vercel deployment for high availability.

title: Government Statutory Computations Research
description: Comprehensive research and documentation for payroll statutory computations.
content: Detailed analysis of government-mandated deductions and employer contributions for accurate payroll processing.

title: Workforce Accountability Research
description: UX research and planning phase for secure attendance verification systems.
content: Defined core problem statements and user personas for HR officers handling attendance monitoring.

title: Practice Web
description: Two-week practice project for core backend and UI concepts.
content: Practice implementation of authentication, dashboards, and profile management.
